reporting.notes_field_policy: Document assumptions in a notes field, do not ask questions.

assumptions.category_source_of_truth: Use the 'category' field on each service; fall back to categories list if needed.
assumptions.book_availability_logic: Available if and only if holdings.json lists a non-empty array for the ISBN; otherwise unavailable with empty locations.
assumptions.time_defaults: If a deadline date is given without time, assume 17:00 in configured timezone.

auditing_checklist: Functions are snake_case and include required names.
No external network requests are made.
All outputs are written to the output directory with expected filenames.
Marketing plan includes exactly the required sections and nine-step sequence.
All JSON outputs are parseable and include required fields.
